title: dolichos decumbens
intro: Dolichos decumbens, also known as the climbing bean or dolichos, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolichos decumbens include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
